rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, avoiding implementation-level bindings in type contracts.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes to avoid type errors.
generic_rules: Ensure all identifiers in AGREE annexes are visible or explicitly declared within the same annex.
When specifying bounds or ranges, use concrete values, named constants, or visible feature names.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must reference valid expressions with known types.
Component type contracts should not use subcomponent ports directly unless represented via variables or outputs.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing non-existent or non-visible identifiers like 'flyByWire_soft' in AGREE annexes.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
